overall.description: Gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a player character walking through an ancient Egyptian city. The journey begins in a narrow ascending alley between mud-brick walls, opens into a plaza lined with ram-headed sphinx statues, and concludes at a temple courtyard. The environment features desert vegetation, burning braziers, and historic architecture under bright midday sun.

scattered rocks and debris along the base of the walls

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a narrow enclosed alley between ancient mud-brick walls. The camera ascends a dirt path scattered with stone rubble, passing under hanging linens strung overhead. Palm trees are visible at the far end, indicating an opening ahead.

segments.scene_description: The path widens into a medium street as the walls recede into the distance. Large ram-headed sphinx statues become visible ahead. Guards stand watch on both sides near burning braziers, and a wooden watchtower is visible on the right.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza lined with massive ram-headed sphinx statues on both sides. Palm trees and gardens flank the path, with rocky mountains visible in the distance. The camera moves through this ceremonial avenue, passing burning braziers and ornate fencing.

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the temple entrance, walking between two massive guardian statues. A red carpet leads toward the temple facade, flanked by stone pillars with burning torches. The temple building becomes prominent ahead, with a guard visible at the top of the stairs.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the temple courtyard, transitioning from dirt to paved stone ground. The area features a central fountain, stone benches, and lush flower beds with red blooms. The temple building now dominates the view ahead, with decorative pots and ornate architecture visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped, enclosed alleyway into the expansive, ornate courtyard of an ancient temple. It begins by ascending a narrow dirt path between mud-brick walls and hanging linens, moving toward the glimpse of palm trees at the far end. As the path widens into a street, the walls recede to reveal burning braziers and a wooden watchtower before the scene opens further into a grand ceremonial plaza lined with massive ram-headed sphinx statues and distant rocky mountains. The camera then proceeds along a red carpet between guardian statues and torch-lit pillars, approaching the temple facade. Finally, the movement transitions from dirt to paved stone as the camera enters the temple courtyard, passing a central fountain and lush red flower beds to face the dominating architecture of the temple.
